# QuickBot — Security & Privacy

We take security seriously.

## Data handling

- All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS).
- We store your data in our secure AWS environment.
- Customer data is used to improve our product. You can opt out by
  emailing privacy@quickbot.ai.

## Access

- Single shared admin account per organization.
- Password authentication.
- SSO is on our roadmap (Q4 2026).

## Audit logs

- We keep logs for 7 days.
- Logs are accessible via the dashboard.
- For data exports, email support@quickbot.ai.

## Certifications

- SOC 2: planned for late 2026.
- GDPR / HIPAA: contact us to discuss.

## Incident response

If something goes wrong, we'll let you know. We don't have a public
status page yet but you can ping us on Slack.
